title: hieracium nigrescens subsp. dolichadenium
intro: Hieracium nigrescens subsp. dolichadenium, also known as Black Hawk's Weed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving digestive issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. In herbal preparations, Hieracium nigrescens subsp. dolichadenium is often used as a tincture, tea, or infusion, although its safety and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically studied.
